Introduction.content: The My Meeting Room service offers a solution to enhance the organization’s collaboration and communication capabilities. This service is designed to streamline Meeting Rooms, improve productivity and create a seamless experience for both in-person and remote participants. With modern devices, technologies and integrated features, the service aims to transform your Meeting Rooms into modern, efficient and collaborative spaces. The service assumes the use of a central management platform for a Meeting Room.

What is the added business value?.header: What is the added business value?
What is the added business value?.content: The My Meeting Room service aims to standardize and streamline your Meeting Room experience by focussing on key features such as high quality audio & video, seamless connectivity, interactive displays, wireless content sharing and room scheduling & management all while doing this in a way to ensure security and privacy. The solution is designed to empower organizations with modern collaboration tools that foster innovation, efficiency and effective communication. By leveraging the aforementioned key features, our service transforms Meeting Rooms into hubs of productivity and creativity, whether participants are gathered in person or attending remotely.

What is included in the service?.header: What is included in the service?
What is included in the service?.content: Our Meeting Room service contains the following minimum set of devices and software: Note that these functionalities are not always realized by separate devices as many of them can be combined into multipurpose devices (e.g. soundbar with built-in camera, all-in-one solution, etc.).

Standard Services.content: The following standard services are available for My Meeting Room: Figure below gives an overview for the different Meeting Room types (explained in more detail in Section ‘Meeting Room types’):  The next Sections will detail all Service Components for a meeting room. A Meeting Room contains the following software components: The following services are provided for the Meeting Room: The aforementioned services are provided using the Platform Management Service. We refer to Cegeka’s Service Description for “Device Lifecycle Management Services” , where following Meeting Room hardware device types: will be managed accordingly. Cegeka aims to be vendor independent (A list of partner Vendors can be found in Section ‘Conditions’). Through workshops – providing guidance to customers to find the ‘best-fit-for-purpose’ equipment, both from an operational as a budgetary point of view - a Hardware Product Catalogue is created, containing for all hardware devices in a specific Meeting Room Type. This Hardware Product Catalogue is reviewed and adapted based on AV vendor market evolution and agreed upon in mutual understanding. We offer different support packages to suit our customers’ need throughout the lifecycle. These packages affect the following HWLCM service activities: BRONZE SILVER GOLD PLATINUM PER DEVICE PER ROOM PER ROOM PER ROOM This support pack is activated by default on all meeting room hardware that is procured via Cegeka. This includes: This support pack is our standard for the modern and “always-on” meeting room in a corporate environment and provides security from Cegeka and the manufacturer. This includes: This support pack is the zero-worry warranty to provide a complete unburdening for the customer. This includes: This support pack is mainly aimed for mission critical rooms and executive board rooms. Tailormade for each and every meeting room. This includes: This section describes the components for each meeting room type. Responsibility Matrix.content: Responsibility Matrix below provides the appropriate RACI tags for Customer and Cegeka with respect to the activities for the Standard and Optional Services. ACTIVITY CEGEKA CUSTOMER STANDARD SERVICES   Software management Management of software Proactive monitoring   L2/L3 remote Technical Incident handling Technical REMOTE L2/L3 incident handling   Hardware Lifecycle management Cegeka refers to THE RACI TABLE OF ‘DEVICE LIFECYCLE MANAGEMENT SERVICES’ Platform Management Management of the Platform (configuration and analysis) Management Platforms   Proactive monitoring   Maintain & support functionality to create Meeting Room accounts   Maintain & support the configured Compliance, Configuration and device restrictions Policies   Management of software Always up-to-date   Integrated security   Management of Drivers/Firmware   review and update of drivers/firmware   Reporting Monthly reporting of active Meeting Rooms in scope   OPTIONAL SERVICES  Physical Booking system Adds additional physical booking system to Meeting Room   = Responsible: Party responsible for performing the activity and/or achieve the task. One party is Responsible, although other Parties can be delegated to assist in the actual work if required. An Accountable must sign off (approve) on work that Responsible provides. Responsible is by default proactive. = Accountable: Party ultimately accountable for the correct and thorough completion of the task and/or activity as performed by Responsible. For each task and/or activity exactly one Accountable must be specified. Accountable has the mandate to accept/dismiss on work provided by Responsible. Accountable is by default reactive. = Consulted: Party to be consulted (whose opinions are sought in two-way communication) when performing tasks and/or activities. Consulted may also provide requirements on scope, result expectations, etc. Consulted is by default reactive. = Informed: Party to be informed / kept up-to-date on tasks and/or activities (just one-way communication). Informed often only on completion of the task and/or activity. Informed no formal role in realization and therefore by default reactive.

Service SKUs.content: MONTHLY SKU Description Unit OF MEASUREMENT STANDARD SKUs My Teamwork – My Meeting Room –Meeting Room SW Support Base fee for Software management of Meeting Room Meeting Room My Teamwork – My Meeting Room – Meeting Room HW Support Bronze Base fee for HW support Bronze of Meeting Room Device My Teamwork – My Meeting Room – Meeting Room HW Support Silver Base fee for HW support Silver of Meeting Room Meeting Room My Teamwork – My Meeting Room – Meeting Room HW Support Gold Base fee for HW support Gold of Meeting Room Meeting Room My Teamwork – My Meeting Room – Meeting Room HW Support Platinum Base fee for HW support Platinum of Meeting Room Meeting Room My Teamwork – My Meeting Room – Hardware Lifecycle Management Base fee for Hardware Lifecycle Management of Meeting Room Device My Teamwork – My Meeting Room – Platform management Base fee for management of the Meeting Room management platform Platform OPTIONAL SKUs My Teamwork – My Meeting Room –Physical Booking System Base fee for Physical Booking system Physical Booking System Measurement The monthly price of the Meeting Room service is based upon a Unit price (P) for following and the quantity of Meeting Rooms, Physical Booking System (Q). The corresponding Unit of Measurement is mentioned in Table above. Definition for central Meeting Room management platform and Meeting Room are mentioned in Section ‘Conditions’. Calculation [( software management per Meeting Room )*(Quantity of Meeting Rooms) + (HCLM Warranty Pack)*( Quantity of Meeting Rooms per Warranty Pack) + (Platform cost)]+[(management Physical Booking System)*(Quantity of Physical Booking Systems)]+ )]

Specific Service Levels.content: This service makes use of a third party PAAS provider. For the SLA’s concerning uptime and/or availability of the 3 rd party platform we refer to the following documentation Service Level Agreements (SLA) for Online Services

Cross-functional services.content: In order to guarantee the Service quality, Cegeka refers to the cross-functional Services from the contract document set and their corresponding standard KPI's.
